extraction.one_line_summary: ALAPHILIPPE Julian attacked from a three-rider breakaway inside 2km after securing a 5-second bonus sprint, holding off HIRSCHI Marc and a charging peloton to win Stage 2 and take yellow.
tactical_patterns: TRENTIN Matteo beat SAGAN Peter in intermediate sprint, signaling unexpected climbing-sprint speed combination for green jersey threat.
COSNEFROY Benoît solo attacked for KOM points mid-climb while rivals watched each other, classic opportunistic mountain jersey tactic.
YATES Adam forced to lead final kilometer despite not wanting stage, showing bonification sprint tactics backfire when peloton closes.
Three-rider break left acceleration until under 2km when peloton closed to 16 seconds, cutting margin dangerously thin.

rider_signals.ALAPHILIPPE Julian: positive: won both bonification sprint (5sec) and stage from late break, showing form recovery after disappointing 2019 finale
rider_signals.HIRSCHI Marc: positive: nearly caught ALAPHILIPPE in final sprint from three-rider break, revealing elite finishing speed on hilly stages
rider_signals.TRENTIN Matteo: positive: out-sprinted SAGAN at intermediate, proving competitive for green jersey on punchy terrain
rider_signals.YATES Adam: neutral: took 8-second bonus at intermediate sprint but forced to sacrifice energy leading final kilometer for breakaway companions
rider_signals.SAGAN Peter: negative: lost intermediate sprint to TRENTIN on terrain that should suit him, concerning for green jersey defense
rider_signals.SIVAKOV Pavel: neutral: started Stage 2 despite heavy bandaging from crashes both sides of body Stage 1, showing team commitment
